violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the wall behind the three bay and mop sink have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Establishment is to clean NFCS behind three bay and mop sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2025
The condensate from the freezer refrigeration unit was observed frozen on the ceiling. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025

The condensate from the walk in freezer refrigeration unit and the cold storage prep unit was observed frozen around the refrigeration fans. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2024
